title: paulownia tomentosa var. glabrata
intro: Paulownia tomentosa var. glabrata, also known as the Chinese handkerchief tree, is a deciduous tree species belonging to the bignonia family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Paulownia tomentosa var. glabrata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparation of this plant is often made into a tea, tincture, or capsule, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
